title: Breinrot MEME
description: Resource pack that replaces Minecraft mobs with Brainrots
body:
**This is a resource pack that will do what you've (probably) wanted for a long time** and that is turn Guardian, Phantom, Chicken and Vindicator into Brainrot memes.

---
